Aberdeen Airport baggage screening staff have dropped 14 days of planned strike action after an agreement was reached with ICTS HBS Security through the conciliation service Acas, following the resolution of two separate earlier pay disputes at the airport.

A government-backed inquiry co-chaired by former home secretary David Blunkett found police leadership in England and Wales plagued by "nepotism and bias", with 78 investigations into police leaders since 2018 and just 13% of constables agreeing they worked in a "well led and managed organisation".

Lockheed Martin is leading the race to buy naval defence group Ultra Maritime for roughly $3.5 billion, with Guggenheim and JPMorgan advising on the sell side and a deal potentially announced as early as this week, according to sources close to CNBC.
